chapter_title.en: Chapter 17 – What are rejected, from the witnesses

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/248)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/248)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الَّذِي يُرَدُّ مِنَ الشُّهُودِ فَقَالَ الظَّنِينُ وَ الْخَصْمُ قَالَ قُلْتُ فَالْفَاسِقُ وَ الْخَائِنُ قَالَ فَقَالَ كُلُّ هَذَا يَدْخُلُ فِي الظَّنِينِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Abdullah Bin Muskan, from Suleyman Bin Khalid who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about those from the witnesses who are rejected. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The suspicious, and the adversary’. I said, ‘So (what about) the immoral and the treacherous?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is included in the suspicious’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muskan from Sulayman ibn Khalid who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the witnesses whose testimony is rejected. He (the Imam) said, ‘Of such people are a pessimist and an antagonist.’ I then asked, ‘What about a sinful and a treacherous one?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Such ones are included in “pessimist”.”’
